paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Moses assembled all the congregation of the children of Israel, and said unto them, These are the words which Jehovah hath commanded, that ye should do them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Six days shall work be done; but on the seventh day there shall be to you a holy day, a sabbath of solemn rest to Jehovah: whosoever doeth any work therein shall be put to death.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Ye shall kindle no fire throughout your habitations upon the sabbath day.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Moses spake unto all the congregation of the children of Israel, saying, This is the thing which Jehovah commanded, saying,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Take ye from among you an offering unto Jehovah; whosoever is of a willing heart, let him bring it, Jehovah`s offering: gold, and silver, and brass,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats` [hair],

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and rams` skins dyed red, and sealskins, and acacia wood,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and oil for the light, and spices for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and onyx stones, and stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And let every wise-hearted man among you come, and make all that Jehovah hath commanded:

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the tabernacle, its tent, and its covering, its clasps, and its boards, its bars, its pillars, and its sockets;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the ark, and the staves thereof, the mercy-seat, and the veil of the screen;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the table, and its staves, and all its vessels, and the showbread;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the candlestick also for the light, and its vessels, and its lamps, and the oil for the light;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the altar of incense, and its staves, and the anointing oil, and the sweet incense, and the screen for the door, at the door of the tabernacle;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the altar of burnt-offering, with its grating of brass, it staves, and all its vessels, the laver and its base;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the hangings of the court, the pillars thereof, and their sockets, and the screen for the gate of the court;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the pins of the tabernacle, and the pins of the court, and their cords;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: the finely wrought garments, for ministering in the holy place, the holy garments for Aaron the priest, and the garments of his sons, to minister in the priest`s office.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the congregation of the children of Israel departed from the presence of Moses.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And they came, every one whose heart stirred him up, and every one whom his spirit made willing, [and] brought Jehovah`s offering, for the work of the tent of meeting, and for all the service thereof, and for the holy garments.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And they came, both men and women, as many as were willing-hearted, [and] brought brooches, and ear-rings, and signet-rings, and armlets, all jewels of gold; even every man that offered an offering of gold unto Jehovah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And every man, with whom was found blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine linen, and goats` [hair], and rams` skins dyed red, and sealskins, brought them.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Every one that did offer an offering of silver and brass brought Jehovah`s offering; and every man, with whom was found acacia wood for any work of the service, brought it.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the women that were wise-hearted did spin with their hands, and brought that which they had spun, the blue, and the purple, the scarlet, and the fine linen.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And all the women whose heart stirred them up in wisdom spun the goats` [hair].

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And the rulers brought the onyx stones, and the stones to be set, for the ephod, and for the breastplate;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and the spice, and the oil; for the light, and for the anointing oil, and for the sweet incense.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: The children of Israel brought a freewill-offering unto Jehovah; every man and woman, whose heart made them willing to bring for all the work, which Jehovah had commanded to be made by Moses.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And Moses said unto the children of Israel, See, Jehovah hath called by name Bezalel the son of Uri, the son of Hur, of the tribe of Judah.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he hath filled him with the Spirit of God, in wisdom, in understanding, and in knowledge, and in all manner of workmanship;

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and to devise skilful works, to work in gold, and in silver, and in brass,

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: and in cutting of stones for setting, and in carving of wood, to work in all manner of skilful workmanship.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: And he hath put in his heart that he may teach, both he, and Oholiab, the son of Ahisamach, of the tribe of Dan.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Them hath he filled with wisdom of heart, to work all manner of workmanship, of the engraver, and of the skilful workman, and of the embroiderer, in blue, and in purple, in scarlet, and in fine linen, and of the weaver, even of them that do any workmanship, and of those that devise skilful works.
